title: Broken or bruised ribs - NHS
text:
worse you have pain in your tummy or shoulder you're coughing up blood It could mean a broken rib has damaged something else, like your lung, liver or spleen.
Information: 
Do not drive to A&E. Ask someone to drive you or call 999 and ask for an ambulance.
Bring any medicines you take with you.
Page last reviewed: 10 January 2024
Next review due: 10 January 2027
